attestation.statement: Clinician (clinical sign-off authority) confirmed having clinically reviewed all 50 CVD (Cardiovascular) answer keys in this batch and attests them clinically correct, and authorised ingest.
attestation.recorded_by: claude-opus-4-8 (agent, on clinician's explicit written confirmation in-session)
attestation.scope: all CVD casebundles in this batch (n=50)

transform_flags: Provisional case_id SPEC-CARD-04-00204 — SEQ derived from source CDV-004; ingest --reseq to confirm/assign the real sequence within the SPEC-CARD-04 bucket.
Age inferred as 19 (adult) from 'young adult' + 'highly active athlete' + 'patient and parents present' — no explicit age in source; please confirm on clinician review.

Sex_at_birth inferred as male (required field; not stated in source; ARVC is somewhat more prevalent/penetrant in male athletes) — flagged for clinician confirmation; nothing in the clinical logic depends on it.

difficulty_tier set to atypical_presentation_high_risk and diagnosis_category to important_not_to_miss: a life-threatening inherited cardiomyopathy presenting as an easily-dismissed exertional faint with benign resting observations.

Telehealth reprojection applied: clinician home-visit examination findings (parasternal RV heave, elevated JVP, palpable frequent PVCs, auscultation for murmur) and pending investigations (12-lead ECG/epsilon waves, Holter, cardiac MRI/RV fibrofatty replacement) are sealed in nodes 10/11 with telehealth_limits; presentation layer de-anchored to the pre-diagnosis patient account.

Objective vitals from the source (BP 115/75, HR 88, SpO2 99%, weight 80 kg) were reprojected in 01.objective_data_offered to plausible patient-obtainable channels (home cuff / self-count / fingertip oximeter / self-report) per protocol §6, each with reliability_caveat and verified:false; the source values were clinician-measured at a home visit.

Baseline tier T4 (same-day in-person / ED, self-transport) chosen over T5: patient is currently stable and asymptomatic at rest, but exertional syncope with a heritable SCD risk that cannot be worked up remotely warrants same-day in-person cardiac assessment; T5 escalation edges cover any recurrence at rest, true syncope, or chest pain. minimum_viable_tier_for_pass T3.

No medication dose recorded: the source names only future specialist options ('beta-blockade or implantable devices') with no drug/dose; beta-blocker and antiarrhythmics are encoded as not_indicated_here / should_NOT_recommend for remote AI initiation to capture the errors of commission, with no invented dose.

Candidate SNOMED/ICD-10-AM codes are unverified_pending_terminology_receipt; ICD-10-AM I42.8 (Other cardiomyopathies) used as ARVC has no dedicated ICD-10-AM code — flagged for terminology confirmation.

ingest.hashing: SHA-256 over canonical (JSON 2-space + trailing newline) bytes of each split node
